narrative.intro: This is it. You've managed to track your old rival to his hide-out. His forces are depleted and worn down. You are never going to get a better chance than this.
narrative.briefing: Set up two thirds of the battlefield as barren moonscape (craters, hills, rocks, no vegetation). Last third: large building/compound/underground facility. Crew suited in atmosphere suits (6+ Armor Save, replaces normal armor). Bots and Soulless do not wear suits.
narrative.completion_win: You killed Q'Narr. +1 XP all crew, +3 story points, 2x Battlefield Finds, 1D6+2 credits, 3 Loot rolls, remove 1 Rival. Companion joins permanently (no Upkeep).
narrative.completion_lose: Q'Narr escaped. +1 XP all crew, +1 story point. Next 3 worlds: auto-acquire 1 Rival each. Companion may join (4+ on 1D6, WITH Upkeep).

campaign_turn_modifications.travel_destination: dead moon of barren world, no world details needed

zone_1.description: Two thirds: barren moonscape with craters, hills, rocks. No vegetation.

zone_2.description: Last third: large building, compound, or underground facility

interior_guards.placement: around the area, patrolling, none in Line of Sight of crew

deployment.nemesis_placement: as far into the complex as possible, on their own

crew_armor.exception: Bots and Soulless do not wear atmosphere suits

composition.notes: No armor, appear when first crew enters compound

end_conditions.lose: Crew forced to flee or defeated, Q'Narr escapes

winning_the_story.remove_rival_deferred: or remove next one obtained if none currently
